title: Hotbar Scroll Keys
description: Implements keybinds to scroll left and right in the hotbar.
body: Tired of fiddly scroll wheels and unreachable hotkeys? Introducing Hotbar Scroll Keys: a no-fuss mod that lets you move left and right in the hotbar with ease. Simply press "[" to go left and "]" to go right. You can customize these keys in the controls menu.
